news.title: ABD'nin saldırılarına karşılık olarak İran Bahreyn ve Kuveyt'i vurdu
news.summary: ABD'nin İran'a yönelik saldırıları iki gündür devam ederken, Bahreyn ve Kuveyt İran'ın füze ve insansız hava aracı saldırılarının hedefi olduklarını açıkladı.

news.title: İstanbul Onur Yürüyüşü'ne polis müdahalesi: 'En az 50 kişi gözaltında'
news.summary: "Açık s'açık yürüyoruz" temasıyla düzenlenen 24'üncü İstanbul Onur Yürüyüşü için 28 Haziran Pazar günü İstanbul Kadıköy'de toplanan gruplara polis müdahale etti.

news.title: Kılıçdaroğlu'nun sözcüsü, Özel'in grup başkanlığından alındığı iddiasını yalanladı
news.summary: Mutlak butlan kararıyla CHP Genel Başkanlığı'na getirilen Kemal Kılıçdaroğlu'nun ekibi, genel başkanlık görevinden alınan Özgür Özel'in TBMM Grup Başkanı sıfatının da düşürülmesi için harekete geçildiği iddiasını yalanladı.

news.title: 'Belleği araba anahtarınınki kadar': Voyager 1 nasıl uzayın en derinliklerine ilerledi?
news.summary: Fırlatılmasından neredeyse 50 yıl sonra, Voyager misyonunun ikiz araçlarından biri bizden bir ışık günü uzaklığa ulaşmak üzere ve hala değerli veriler gönderiyor.

news.title: Erkek sağlığının barometresi penis
news.summary: Peniste sertleşme bozukluğu kalp krizi, felç, diyabet ve demansın erken bir uyarı işareti olabilir. Araştırmacılara göre, hem hastaların hem de doktorların artık bu durumu ciddiye almaya başlamalarının zamanı geldi.

news.title: Balıkesir'de 4 büyüklüğünde deprem
news.summary: Balıkesir'in Sındırgı ilçesinde saat 15.56'da 4 büyüklüğünde deprem meydana geldi.

news.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
news.summary: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

news.title: In Caracas, this feels like the hardest moment in Venezuela's modern history
news.summary: Rescue teams are working ceaselessly to reach those trapped under rubble. But as hope fades, anger is growing.

news.title: US and Iran exchange strikes and accuse each other of violating ceasefire
news.summary: Iran says it has launched retaliatory attacks at US infrastructure in Kuwait and Bahrain after the US said it hit multiple targets across Iran.

news.title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
news.summary: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.

news.title: Heatwave breaks records in Germany, Denmark and Czech Republic
news.summary: An estimated 150 million people have been experiencing temperatures of over 35C across Europe.

news.title: Australian man charged with murder after girl found dead in suitcase in Thailand
news.summary: The 17-year-old's body was found discarded near a railway track on Saturday, police say.

news.title: Israel strikes Lebanon, testing days-old peace deal
news.summary: Hezbollah calls the deal a surrender as Israeli forces stay put and continue striking the south.

news.title: Ben Stokes, England test captain, to retire from international cricket

news.title: Trade tensions shake up Brazil's caipirinha spirit
news.summary: U.S. tariff pressure is pushing Europe and Brazil closer—opening new global doors for everything from aircraft parts to Brazil's cachaça, the base of the caipirinha.

news.title: Three firefighters killed on Colorado-Utah border as wildfires intensify
news.summary: The deaths occurred as crews battled multiple blazes across a parched region. Two other firefighters were also injured.

news.title: These church members disagree on politics. Together they're wiping out medical debt
news.summary: Trinity Moravian Church, a politically diverse congregation in Winston-Salem, N. C., has been raising money to retire medical debt in the surrounding community.

news.title: Tips for taking care of your pets when fireworks are booming
news.summary: Communities around the U.S. are putting on epic fireworks shows for America's 250th birthday — but that spells trouble for dogs and cats. Here's a guide to help the animals in your life.

news.title: July 4th fireworks in Washington: What's different for America's 250th?
news.summary: Dozens of technicians will fire off about 851,000 fireworks on July 4, aiming to break a world record in what organizers hope will be the "most memorable display this generation will have ever seen."

news.title: Will the new student loan limits actually drive down tuition? Economists weigh in
news.summary: The idea that there's a connection between federal student loans and what colleges charge dates back almost four decades. But it's unclear that link can lead to lower costs.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
